info.name: PROCEL Ingestion - API Smoke Test
info.description: Colecao Postman baseada no script PowerShell de smoke test da API (rooms sync, sensors seed, pessoa CRUD, presenca checkin/checkout, DER Parameter Qualification, ingest mock, medicoes queries).

exec: // Define janela de consulta: Ãºltimos 10 minutos
